name: Coffee Cake Apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the topping dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the fat until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Blend in the apples and raisins.
4. This topping can be used on top of the cake or in the bottom of the pan. A crustier product results when the apple mixture is used on top.
5. When the apple mixture is used in the bottom of the pan, the cake is quite moist.
